response.original_title: El Jubileo de Su Santidad, película de las corporaciones oficiales para celebrar la festividad del Papa en la Catedral de Lima
response.overview: This film was shot and developed by Mr. Cazes, sent expressly by Pathé of Paris for the national company that holds film screenings in the tent at San Juan de Dios. It shows all the officials who accompanied the President of the Republic that day, the Military Household of the Head of State, and the Escort. It was also possible to film the army parade that same day, after the religious festivities had concluded... Given that these are local events, where a large number of well-known people will be seen, it is to be expected that the house will be full.
response.title: El Jubileo de Su Santidad, película de las corporaciones oficiales para celebrar la festividad del Papa en la Catedral de Lima
